# Archived Workflows

This directory contains legacy/redundant GitHub Actions workflows that have been consolidated into canonical workflows.

## Consolidated Workflows (Active)

1. **ci.yml** - Main CI pipeline (lint, typecheck, test, build)
2. **security.yml** - Security scanning (CodeQL, dependency audit)
3. **deploy.yml** - Unified deployment pipeline
4. **codeql.yml** - CodeQL security analysis (kept as standalone per GitHub best practices)

## Archived Workflows

All other workflows in the `.archived/` subdirectory have been consolidated or deprecated.
They are retained for reference only.

Date: 2026-01-24
